sub_modules.conv2d_coeff_rom: Combinational default coefficient generator for the flattened convolution kernel.
sub_modules.conv2d_window_pad: Combinational window padding mask used for early top and left border cycles.
sub_modules.conv2d_dot_product: Combinational matrix-vector multiply-accumulate datapath over the flattened stencil window.
sub_modules.conv2d_output_cast: Combinational cast from internal accumulator width to the required output pixel width.
